data.title: Implement ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs (sort and deduplicate TypeScript imports)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs — Node.js ES module that uses ts-morph to sort and deduplicate TypeScript imports.

### Implementation:
- Read RECIPE_PARAM_FILE (single file to normalize), RECIPE_PARAM_DIR (directory to process all TS files), RECIPE_WORKING_DIR (project root for tsconfig.json resolution)
- Load ts-morph Project from tsconfig.json in RECIPE_WORKING_DIR
- For each target file: use ts-morph's SourceFile.organizeImports() to sort and deduplicate imports. This uses the TypeScript compiler's built-in organize-imports operation.
- Detect changes: compare before/after text. Only count file as changed if content differs.
- Idempotent: organizeImports() on already-organized imports is a no-op.
- Output JSON: {files_changed: [paths], transforms_applied: N, errors: [], exit_code: 0}

### Notes:
- ts-morph SourceFile.organizeImports() respects tsconfig paths and project conventions
- For composite projects, load via Project constructor with tsconfig.json path
- If ts-morph not found in RECIPE_WORKING_DIR/node_modules, try global; output error JSON if unavailable

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs
- [ ] Valid Node.js syntax
  Verify: node --check plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs
- [ ] All tests in test-ts-morph-normalize-imports.sh pass (when ts-morph installed)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-normalize-imports.sh
